title: Victorian Mansion Cheongsam Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Victorian Mansion Cheongsam Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic editorial portrait of 20-year-old East Asian woman with tall slim-curvy build and calm editorial expression in intricately embroidered cheongsam with mandarin collar, traditional frog-button closures, and delicate floral embroidery, seated inside abandoned Victorian mansion with peeling and torn wallpaper backdrop. Subject: 20-year-old East Asian woman with tall slim-curvy build and calm editorial expression is styled with luminous natural skin tones, realistic proportions, and a fully covered fitted silhouette while the embroidered cheongsam fabric remains the visual centerpiece. Scene: abandoned Victorian mansion with peeling and torn wallpaper backdrop provides peeling wallpaper, torn wall textures, ornate furniture, amber night atmosphere, and a quiet abandoned-mansion editorial mood. Composition: seated cross-legged in a plush ornate velvet armchair, hands resting naturally, head tilted at a three-quarter side angle with cowboy/American shot framing, three-quarter side angle, hands resting naturally, plush ornate velvet armchair, and balanced negative space around the mansion backdrop. Signature Elements: Preserved victorian mansion cheongsam editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic fashion editorial portrait with Fujifilm Provia film simulation, balanced color rendering, realistic fabric drape, detailed embroidery, and high-end magazine finish. Color Palette: Warm tungsten amber, faded Victorian wallpaper tones, deep velvet chair color, embroidered floral accents, natural skin tones, and soft shadow browns. Lighting: Warm indoor tungsten glow, amber night atmosphere, soft face illumination, gentle fabric highlights, and controlled editorial contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
